testTarget.reason: HighlightedText has untested core logic for furigana generation, Japanese text segmentation, and audio-time word highlighting. It is the most valuable missing test after hooks and AudioPlayer/JapanesePhrase/RecordingControls already have coverage. VoiceRecorder.tsx is a trivial wrapper around already-tested RecordingControls.

refactorCandidate.reason: None of the listed refactor candidates exceed 300 lines in the current codebase; all have been refactored or split since the checklist was written.

notes: Analysis: 87 frontend tests, 35 backend tests. useAudioPlayer, useFurigana, useChatSession all have tests. AudioPlayer.test.tsx and JapanesePhrase.test.tsx exist. VoiceRecorder directory contains RecordingControls.test.tsx but VoiceRecorder.tsx is only a 11-line wrapper; no separate VoiceRecorder.test.tsx needed. HighlightedText has no test directory and contains the highest-value untested logic (furigana, segmenting, sync).
